mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, email, password_hash, role, is_temp_password) VALUES (#{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{role}, #{isTempPassword})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash}, is_temp_password = FALSE WHERE id = #{id}
